gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 first requested release-evidence enforcement of the adapter contract and then requested strict bool/int validation. Both were fixed, re-verified, and the final review returned APPROVED.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_release_evidence.py tests/test_native_probe_factories.py tests/test_release_bundle.py tests/test_public_package.py -q -> 114 passed
what_changed: Native probe factory diagnostics now publish a stable adapter_contract describing the required engine handoff, probe/action schema versions, Qwen3 V1 layout, merged payload mode, and native-probe requirement.
Release evidence validation now enforces the same adapter contract for native probe and action evidence instead of accepting mismatched segmented payloads.
The restaurant compatibility facade exports the new contract helper, and tests cover malformed contract values including bool/int type confusion.
why: Future vLLM/SGLang adapters need a machine-checkable contract, and release bundles must not claim a native adapter contract that their probe/action evidence does not satisfy.
